seoTitle: East Kempsey vs East Kurrajong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Kempsey and East Kurrajong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Kempsey vs East Kurrajong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Kempsey and East Kurrajong.
heading: East Kempsey vs East Kurrajong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Kempsey, New South Wales and East Kurrajong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to East Kurrajong (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Kempsey or East Kurrajong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Kempsey has a flood risk score of 34/100, while East Kurrajong scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Kempsey scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. East Kurrajong scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Kempsey or East Kurrajong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
